summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification. The hydrated preflight artifact covers 20 of 25 listed PRs; those are open pull requests with current updated_at values and no security-sensitive signal, so they are classified independently. Five listed PRs were absent from the hydrated item matrix and require human/live-state refresh before classification.
